scripts.dev: concurrently --names "frontend,mcp,llm" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow" --kill-others-on-fail "bun run --cwd frontend dev" "bun run --cwd mcp_server dev" "./scripts/dev-llm.sh"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "frontend,mcp,llm" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow" --kill-others-on-fail "bun run --cwd frontend start" "bun run --cwd mcp_server start" "./scripts/dev-llm.sh"
scripts.dev:llm:stop: kill $(lsof -ti:4000) 2>/dev/null && echo 'LiteLLM stopped' || echo 'LiteLLM not running'
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:frontend && bun run typecheck:shared
scripts.prisma:migrate:dev: bun run --cwd packages/shared prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:migrate:deploy: bun run --cwd packages/shared prisma migrate deploy
scripts.prisma:migrate:status: bun run --cwd packages/shared prisma migrate status
